prompt: A highly detailed photorealistic LEGO interpretation of Plaza de España, Seville, shown as a grand golden-hour architectural scene from canal level. The image is vertical and cinematic, with the viewer looking straight down a narrow curved canal toward an ornate Spanish Renaissance Revival palace facade built entirely from LEGO bricks. The warm terracotta building fills the upper half of the frame, with multiple towers, arched colonnades, balconies, decorative cornices, and intricate brick-built ornamentation. A small Spanish flag flies from the central tower. In the foreground, a LEGO rowboat with 2 minifigures is seen from behind, drifting along the canal; one has reddish-brown hair and the other light brown hair, both rowing with long brown oars. In the mid-distance, there is a second small rowboat with 2 minifigures under or near an elegant arched bridge. Count 2 boats total and 4 rowing passengers total. Along the right-side promenade, count 4 visible standing minifigures placed at intervals beside the tiled railing. The canal is lined with detailed blue, white, and yellow ceramic-style LEGO mosaic balustrades and brick parapets, with black vintage street lamps; count 7 visible lamp posts total. On the left edge, include 2 rounded pink flowering shrubs in planters. The bridge crossing the canal has ornate blue-and-white LEGO tile patterns and a graceful single arch. The water should look realistic yet made from small glossy LEGO-like tiles, with dark teal reflections of the building and sky. Lighting is soft sunset light with a glowing amber sky, scattered clouds, long highlights, and rich warm shadows. Emphasize realism, fine texture, playful scale illusion, and the convincing blend of real architectural grandeur with unmistakable LEGO construction.
